allow: Bash(node -e "const db=require\('./config/database'\); db.query\('SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name=\\'users\\' ORDER BY ordinal_position'\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.column_name\).join\(', '\)\); process.exit\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\)}\)")
